# Specification: Minimal Thing

## Overview

A tiny spec meant to exercise the `keep_whole_below` gate. This file is
intentionally shorter than the threshold so the chunker must return it as
a single chunk without touching heading parsing.

## Requirements

- The thing must do its job.
- The thing must not do anything else.
- The thing must be documented.

## Out of Scope

Anything not listed above.
